mechanism: Each Container App Job authenticates as the landing zone managed identity. No separate identity per job.
why: Per-job identities require dedicated least-privilege RBAC per job type. Trade-off: all jobs inherit Owner at subscription scope — control-plane-only bounds blast radius to ARM operations.

related.note: Jobs configured with the landing zone identity — no separate identity provisioned.
Identity must be provisioned before jobs can authenticate.
Directory Reader lets cleanup-roles job query Entra ID for principals.

violations: Container App Job with a separate service principal.
Automation job with permissions at management group scope.
